title: Make serial extraction merge only processed deltas
problem: The first serial runner replayed every existing delta on each merge, so future or stale deltas could leak into earlier paper contexts.
proposed_change: Track accepted_so_far inside run-serial and rebuild the normalized graph only from deltas already processed in the selected order.
acceptance_criteria: A regression with a pre-existing future delta shows the earlier paper package has an empty graph context; AG95 pilot serial replay shows 26/33, then 38/45, then 45/54.

history.note: run-serial now merges only accepted_so_far and refreshes skipped packages.
